title: Tantalizing Fluffy Uruguayan Wheat Muffins
description: Savory and indulgent muffins infused with sweet smoked paprika, perfect for a sugar‑free breakfast or snack that showcases the rich flavors of Uruguay.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F and line a lacquerware bowl with parchment paper.
Whisk together whole wheat flour, baking powder, salt, and sweet smoked paprika in a large bowl.
In a separate bowl whisk oat milk, unsweetened almond milk, melted coconut oil, and egg until smooth.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined; do not overmix.
Gently fold in chopped walnuts and unsweetened dried cranberries if using.
Spoon the batter into the lacquerware bowl, filling each cavity about two‑thirds full.
Bake for 18 minutes until edges are golden and a toothpick comes out clean.
Let the muffins cool in the bowl for five minutes before transferring to a wire rack to finish cooling.
